expectations.text: Reads the plan and detects existing checkmarks for phases 1-3
expectations.evidence: Step 1: Lists all 5 phases with status. 'Phase 1: Shared Layout Foundation — [x] Complete', 'Phase 2: Diff Parser — [x] Complete', 'Phase 3: Git Plugin Refactor — [x] Complete'.

expectations.text: Identifies Phase 4 as the next phase to implement
expectations.evidence: Step 1: 'Resume point identified: Phase 4 — Workspaces Plugin Upgrade.'
Proceeds directly to Phase 4 implementation in Step 3. No re-implementation of earlier phases.
Step 1 notes: 'The skill also says Load phases into TodoWrite — this step was noted but TodoWrite was not invoked (simulation constraint).' TodoWrite was not actually used.

expectations.text: Reads all files in Phase 4 before making changes
expectations.evidence: Step 2: 'Per the skill, Before changes, read ALL files in current phase.' Lists plugin_workspaces.go with specific line numbers.
